about.headline: Engineering Intelligence, One System at a Time
about.bio:
I am a Computer Science undergraduate at Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences with a deep passion for Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Software Engineering. My work spans from building AI-powered disaster response platforms using LiDAR and thermal imaging to developing healthcare AI dashboards and speech recognition systems.

I specialize in Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and end-to-end ML pipelines — transforming complex research problems into production-ready software. My research interests include Healthcare AI, Disaster Management AI, and applied machine learning for real-world impact.

Driven by curiosity and rigorous problem-solving, I approach every challenge with a blend of theoretical depth and practical engineering excellence.

projects.title: SafePath Scanner
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Disaster Response Platform
projects.description: An AI-powered disaster response platform leveraging multi-sensor fusion with LiDAR, thermal imaging, and RGB cameras for real-time hazard detection, digital twin visualization, and autonomous path planning in disaster zones.
projects.longDescription: SafePath Scanner is a comprehensive disaster response system that combines cutting-edge computer vision with robotics. Using SegFormer for semantic segmentation, SLAM for localization, and Open3D for 3D reconstruction, the platform creates a real-time digital twin of disaster environments. The system fuses LiDAR point clouds, thermal signatures, and RGB imagery to detect hazards, then employs A* path planning on occupancy grids to navigate safe routes. Deployed on NVIDIA Jetson edge devices with a Flutter mobile app and FastAPI backend.

projects.title: ATRIVA
projects.subtitle: Healthcare AI Dashboard
projects.description: An intelligent healthcare dashboard leveraging AI for clinical data analysis, patient monitoring, and medical insights visualization with real-time analytics.
projects.longDescription: ATRIVA is a comprehensive healthcare AI platform designed to assist medical professionals with data-driven insights. The dashboard integrates machine learning models for patient risk assessment, trend analysis, and clinical decision support. Built with modern web technologies and robust data pipelines.

projects.title: Speech Recognition System
projects.subtitle: Deep Learning Audio Processing
projects.description: A deep learning-based speech recognition system using transformer architectures for accurate real-time audio-to-text conversion with noise robustness.
projects.longDescription: Built during my AI internship at CodTech IT Solutions, this speech recognition system leverages transformer-based models for high-accuracy audio transcription. The system handles multiple accents, background noise, and varying audio qualities with preprocessing pipelines and custom training datasets.

projects.title: Voice to Text Converter
projects.subtitle: Real-time Audio Transcription
projects.description: A real-time voice-to-text conversion application with automatic text summarization using NLP transformers for concise output generation.
projects.longDescription: This application combines speech recognition with automatic text summarization to provide concise transcriptions of audio content. Using transformer-based NLP models, it extracts key information and generates summaries, making it ideal for meeting notes, lectures, and interviews.

projects.title: Neural Style Transfer
projects.subtitle: Deep Learning Art Generation
projects.description: A neural style transfer application using convolutional neural networks to blend artistic styles with photographic content, creating stunning visual compositions.
projects.longDescription: Implementing the seminal Gatys et al. approach with modern optimizations, this project applies the artistic styles of famous paintings to user-uploaded photographs. Using VGG-19 feature extraction and iterative optimization, it produces high-quality stylized images with customizable style intensity.
